follow_ups.title: Add real backend transport adapters to incremental UX gate
follow_ups.reason: The current incremental UX gate validates protocol behavior with fake adapters only. Real Qwen/FunASR/MiMo candidates need a localhost service or transport client adapter before model comparisons can share one canonical gate.

follow_ups.title: Run Qwen3-ASR MLX 0.6B behind a real local service boundary
follow_ups.reason: Qwen3-ASR MLX 0.6B cumulative recompute has only passed an in-process prototype. It must be validated through a real service process, transport boundary, cancellation, stale-event rejection, memory, and latency evidence before app integration.

follow_ups.title: Probe MiMo-V2.5-ASR MLX final-only and coarse incremental modes
follow_ups.reason: MiMo has strong file-level quality but high memory and unknown final/coarse-incremental latency under a persistent local service workflow.
